mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals tighter monetary policy, which raises discount rates and reduces equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when FEDFUNDS rises, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 320 in CPIAUCSL indicates central bank inaction, leading to higher real interest rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when CPIAUCSL exceeds 320, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in the federal funds rate and CPIAUCSL signal stagflationary pressures, causing equity market sell-offs and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL rise, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-unemployment regime (UNRATE > 4.5%), declining labor participation signals weak economic growth, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when UNRATE exceeds 4.5%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production (INDPRO) reflects robust manufacturing activity, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances when INDPRO rises, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong job growth (PAYEMS > 150k) indicates a tightening labor market, which supports consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances when PAYEMS exceeds 150k, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST > 1300k) signal strong demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances when HOUST exceeds 1300, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and residential sales (RSAFS) indicates strong overall demand, driving corporate profits and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances when both GDPC1 and RSAFS rise, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
